description: Style NoteNail that corporate style with these sharp shoes from arrow with a clean silhouette and tough stitches. If you're looking for a comfy formal shoe that has the durability of everyday staples, this is the right pair. These slip-on shoes add a roguish twist to your conventional formal ensemble.Product DetailsBrown slip-on shoe with stitched detailing on the seams of the toe box, overlays and reinforced overlay at the heel counterElasticated gussets on either sides of the tonguePadded tongue and innerOutsole adhered to the upper for durabilityTextured TPU outsole with a stacked heel Material and CareLeatherUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to clean this product
